---
description: "Instructions for developing a React chat app with AI agent for text and file sharing"
---

# Paysheets App Development Instructions

This is a React application built with Vite for a chat interface with an AI agent. Users can send text messages and share files like PDFs.

## Key Requirements
- Build a responsive chat UI
- Implement text messaging
- Add file upload functionality for PDFs and other files
- Integrate with an AI agent (backend to be added later)
- Use React hooks and functional components
- Keep code modular and maintainable
- Handle file uploads securely

## Coding Guidelines
- Use TypeScript if possible (add later)
- Follow React best practices
- Use CSS modules or styled-components for styling
- Implement error handling for file uploads
- Ensure accessibility

## File Structure
- `src/App.jsx`: Main app component with chat interface
- `src/components/`: Reusable components
- `src/hooks/`: Custom hooks
- `src/utils/`: Utility functions

When adding features, create new components in `src/components/` and update the main App accordingly.
